Hermosillo 2010 Dengue Observations

Source: R/data.R
dengue_hermosillo_2010.Rd

Weekly counts of classical and hemorrhagic dengue cases used in the package examples, tests, and case-study workflow.

Usage

dengue_hermosillo_2010

Format

A data frame with 16 rows and 3 variables:

week

Epidemiological week number.

classical

Observed classical dengue cases.

hemorrhagic

Observed hemorrhagic dengue cases.

Source

Raw study file inst/extdata/raw/study_data_dengue_hemorrhagic_fever.csv.

On this page
